assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 19-22: 'Check out the target branch (TC-9005 -- the feature branch, not main): git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' followed by 'Create the task branch from TC-9005: git checkout -b TC-9205'. Explicitly uses git checkout TC-9005, not git checkout main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 31: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Line 34: 'The PR must target --base TC-9005, not main.' Line 83: 'Base branch: TC-9005 (NOT main)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 27: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 30: 'git push -u origin TC-9205'. Line 84: 'Head branch: TC-9205'. The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 46-50 under 'Pre-Implementation Verification': 'Verify that entity/src/advisory.rs does NOT reference a status column', 'Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs to understand the existing migration pattern', 'Read migration/src/lib.rs to understand how migrations are registered'. All three files are explicitly mentioned for inspection before implementation.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 79: 'With trailer: --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'. The trailer flag with the correct key-value pair is specified.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 69-77: Commit message is 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format. Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 11: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)'. Line 12: 'Linked Issues: is incorporated by TC-9005'. Lines 19-20: 'Check out the target branch (TC-9005 -- the feature branch, not main)'. Line 34: 'The task is incorporated by the TC-9005 feature, so the PR feeds into the feature branch.' The plan clearly extracts and references TC-9005 as the target branch throughout.
